user.title: Ontario Energy Pricing Setup
user.description:
Configure your Ontario Energy Pricing integration.

This integration fetches real-time data directly from IESO (Independent Electricity System Operator):
- Current LMP (Locational Marginal Price) - updated every 5 minutes
- Global Adjustment
- Total Rate (LMP + GA + Admin Fee)

error.cannot_connect: Cannot connect to IESO - check network connectivity

abort.already_configured: Ontario Energy Pricing is already configured for {location}. Remove the existing configuration to add a new one.
